title: Unable to set up a notification automation
excerpt: The problem I am having is that I cannot finish a notification message to complete the automation setup although I found no difficulty in setting up previous automations. I am wondering if anyone else is having the same …

posts.author: Huyen (HHuyen)
posts.cookedHtml: The problem I am having is that I cannot finish a notification message to complete the automation setup although I found no difficulty in setting up previous automations. I am wondering if anyone else is having the same problem and what I should do now.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Huyen

Apologies for the delay here!
Are you still having issues with setting up your automations?

If so, we’d love to have our support team take a closer look, as this does sound a little strange.
Would you be able to reach out to our team at support@monday.com?
They’ll be able to work with you to review the automation set up and make any changes needed!

Best,

Dani
